subject: Welcome to Momentos by Chris, Maria!
body: Thanks for reaching out. I've got your event on my radar. Let's talk details.

subject: Your Sweet 16 deposit receipt
body: Got your deposit of $500. You're on the books. I'll send the venue checklist next week.

subject: Momentos by Chris — event timeline
body: Here's your event timeline. Review it and let me know if anything needs adjusting.

subject: May Cookie Flavors — Momentos by Chris
body: New seasonal flavors are ready. Here's what's available for May orders.

subject: Your cookie order is confirmed
body: 3 dozen custom cookies confirmed for your event. Pickup is Thursday.

subject: Event reminder — 2 weeks out
body: Your event is in two weeks. Final headcount and menu selections are due by Friday.

subject: Post-event feedback — Momentos by Chris
body: Hope the event went great. If you have a minute, I'd appreciate a short review.
